html:
Exclusive to:  

The Compost Wrap is a character-specific Item craftable only by Wormwood in the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Green Thumb Tab and requires 5 Manure, 2 Rot, and 1 Nitre to craft.

The Compost Wrap is used for Health restoration, healing 30 each after a short animation where Wormwood smears a brown substance over his body and face. Like most healing items, it can be used to heal most Mobs in the game, excluding Chester and most Monsters.

Bugs

  • Wormwood will still play the same healing animation when using the Compost Wrap to heal other Mobs.

Gallery

  • Concept art of Compost Wrap (top left) from Rhymes With Play #241.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

The Compost Wrap is a character-specific Item craftable only by Wormwood in the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Green Thumb Tab and requires 5 Manure, 2 Rot, and 1 Nitre to craft.
The Compost Wrap is used for Health restoration, healing 30 each after a short animation where Wormwood smears a brown substance over his body and face. Like most healing items, it can be used to heal most Mobs in the game, excluding Chester and most Monsters.
Bugs[edit | edit source]
Wormwood will still play the same healing animation when using the Compost Wrap to heal other Mobs.

Concept art of Compost Wrap (top left) from Rhymes With Play #241.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Màng Bọc Phân Trộn là một Vật Phẩm dành riêng cho nhân vật chỉ có Wormwood mới có thể chế tạo được trong Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Ngón Tay Cái Màu Xanh Lá Cây và cần 5 Phân , 2 Thối và 1 Nitre để chế tạo.

The '''Compost Wrap''' is a [[character]]-specific [[Item]] craftable only by [[Wormwood]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Green Thumb Tab]] and requires 5 [[Manure]], 2 [[Rot]], and 1 [[Nitre]] to craft.

The Compost Wrap is used for [[Health]] restoration, healing 30 {{hp}} each after a short animation where Wormwood smears a brown substance over his body and face. Like most healing items, it can be used to heal most [[Mobs]] in the game, excluding [[Chester]] and most [[Monsters]].

== {{Pic32|Mosquito}} Bugs ==
* Wormwood will still play the same healing animation when using the Compost Wrap to heal other Mobs.
